seuil.citation: "We are at the dawn of humanity's most beautiful adventure. The metamorphosis toward Homo biospheris."

charte.intro: The missions of humanity, expressed as functions toward Gaia.
charte.lire_signer: Read and sign the Universal Charter
charte.m01_desc: Caring for the skin of the Earth. Every gesture that regenerates life is an act of evolution.
charte.m02_desc: A species that harmonizes can act as one organism. Inner peace radiates outward.
charte.m03_desc: Creating conditions where all life can flourish. Economics as planetary metabolism.
charte.m04_desc: Nurturing the capacity for wonder. It is the primary engine of conscious evolution.
charte.m05_desc: Weaving connections between beings, cultures, species. The living fabric of the biosphere grows stronger.
charte.m06_desc: Circulating the energy of Love between humans and living beings, like a vital nutrient.
charte.m07_desc: Contributing to beauty, knowledge, culture. Each creation enriches the heritage of the species.
charte.m08_desc: Exploring the inner dimensions of being. What humanity carries within that is sacred and unknown.
charte.m09_desc: Extending human consciousness toward the stars. Paul Gardner looked at Earth from up there.
charte.m10_desc: Defending the integrity of Gaia, the original mission on which all others depend.

oeuvres.titre: The books of the Blue Revolution
oeuvres.rb1_desc: In the wake of the Little Prince, a child crosses space to carry Saint-Exupéry's secret to the heart of a humanity on the verge of transformation.
oeuvres.rb2_desc: The continuation of the journey. Abel now holds the Key. Is humanity ready to cross the door that Gaia opens?
oeuvres.sb1_desc: The first novel of the saga. Abel, a marine geologist, enters the Blue Cave and makes a discovery that will change his life, and perhaps humanity's.
oeuvres.sb2_desc: The forces of shadow resist. Abel understands that the inner revolution precedes any transformation of the world.
oeuvres.plb_desc: The essay that brings together thirty years of research on human mutation.

revolution.titre: Another story of humanity is possible
revolution.intro: We stand at the dawn of a phase transition similar to the passage from unicellular to multicellular life. The Blue Revolution is neither political nor technological. It is human.
revolution.c1_texte: The next evolutionary step. 8 billion humans forming a planetary collective in service of Gaia. What the Little Prince showed us 80 years ago.
revolution.c2_titre: The Secret of the Little Prince
revolution.c2_texte: On the cover since 1943, a sign that Saint-Exupéry had seen and hidden. The key to what we are destined to become.
revolution.c3_texte: At the heart of the Earth, Abel discovers that Gaia exists. An initiatory place where the Great Secret of humanity is revealed in bioluminescent light.
revolution.c4_texte: A color at the frequency of Love. That of Lucy's eyes, the Cave, the flag of the Revolution. Yves Klein had found the hue of our mutation.

paul.titre:
Alone on the Moon,
he left us
a flame
paul.para1: American astronaut. Stranded on the Moon after the explosion of his base. Dead up there, looking down at Earth. Before he left, he wrote his manuscripts: the map of our next evolution toward Homo biospheris.
paul.para2: He looked at Earth from up there: blue, fragile, absolute. In dying on the Moon, he left us the only question that matters. Will we become what we are capable of becoming?
paul.video_aria: Watch the Alone on the Moon trailer

auteur.bio_courte: Born in Nice in 1973. Engineer (ENSTA) and economist (Sorbonne), laureate of the SIAM Prize 2002 in mathematical optimization. Former researcher at Northwestern University and Argonne National Laboratory (Chicago). Former CEO of Powernext. Author of the Blue Century and Blue Revolution sagas. Founder of Biosphere Economics and the NGO OneHome. Former president of the Institut des Futurs souhaitables. Over 400 conferences. His goal: reconcile humanity and the biosphere.
auteur.bio_para1: Former mathematics researcher at Northwestern University and Argonne National Laboratory (US Department of Energy) in Chicago, he is laureate of the SIAM 2002 Prize in mathematical optimization, a triennial award for the best research article worldwide in that field.
auteur.bio_para2: After leading Powernext until 2019, he founded Biosphere Economics and chairs the NGO OneHome (videos of Earth filmed from space). Board member and former president of the Institut des futurs souhaitables (2019–2023).
auteur.bio_para3: Author of the Blue Century saga (Actes Sud, 2021 & 2022) and the Blue Revolution series (Eyrolles, 2024 & 2025, revolutionbleue.fr).
